talks.title: The Future of JavaScript Frameworks
talks.description: A deep dive into the evolving landscape of JavaScript frameworks, and what to expect in the next 5 years.

talks.title: Building Scalable APIs with Node.js
talks.description: Learn how to design and build APIs that can handle millions of requests, using the latest Node.js features.

talks.title: CSS Grid and Flexbox: A Love Story
talks.description: Master the art of layout with CSS Grid and Flexbox. We'll explore practical examples and advanced techniques.

talks.title: Securing Your Web Applications
talks.description: An overview of common web vulnerabilities and how to prevent them. We'll cover everything from XSS to CSRF.

talks.title: Introduction to Machine Learning with TensorFlow.js
talks.description: Bring the power of machine learning to the browser with TensorFlow.js. No Python required!

talks.title: The Power of Serverless Functions
talks.description: Discover how serverless functions can simplify your architecture, reduce costs, and improve scalability.
